component.name: Pigment
component.summary: Manage and launch Roblox on Linux via Sober

description.p: Pigment is a launcher and manager for Roblox on Linux — a Bloxstrap-class front end for Sober, the runtime that runs the Android Roblox client (the one path that works under Roblox's anti-cheat). Sober works well but is configured entirely by hand-editing JSON; Pigment gives it a real GUI.

ul.li: Settings: a typed interface over every Sober configuration key
Profiles: named setups applied one at a time, automatically on launch
FastFlags: a validating JSON editor in Bloxstrap's exact format
Mods: file overlays via Sober's sanctioned asset overlay, validated against the Roblox asset tree
Default launcher: opt-in, reversible takeover of the roblox:// handler
Activity history and Discord Rich Presence

description.p: Pigment does not reimplement the runtime; it drives Sober as-is. It is unofficial and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Roblox Corporation or VinegarHQ.

screenshot.caption: The Home page, showing Sober runtime status and launcher controls
The FastFlags editor, in Bloxstrap's JSON format
Recent games activity, resolved from Sober's logs

description.p: Renames the application ID to net.pigmentlab.Pigment. Existing desktop entries and the roblox:// handler registration are re-created under the new ID; reinstalling picks this up automatically.
Flatpak packaging with AppStream metadata; sandbox-aware Sober integration.
Renames the GUI binary to pigmentlab to avoid a collision, and adds Flatpak packaging.
